mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql001 */ B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS BRAND_CODE, B.BB_PRODUCT_NAME AS BRAND_NAME, G.CIGARETTE_SHOW_FLAG AS SMOKING_CIGARETTE, G.EDELIV_ONLY_FLAG AS ONLY_ELECTRONIC_DELIVERY, CASE WHEN B.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN B.BB_LOT_ISSUE_PRICE WHEN B.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN G.PRICE END AS ISSUE_BB_PRICE, B.BB_STOCK AS UNIT, DECODE( B.BB_UNIT_KBN, '1', '株', '2', '円', '3', '口', '株' ) AS SELL_BUY_UNIT_TYPE, NVL( TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(G.BB_PERIOD_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD' ) , ' ' ) AS BB_PERIOD_FROM, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(G.BB_PERIOD_TO, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD' ) AS BB_PERIOD_TO, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(G.PAYMENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD' ) AS PAYMENT_DATE, G.COM AS SUBSCRIPT_COMM, B.BB_SETTLE_DATE AS DELIVERY_DUE_DATE, C.BUTEN_CODE, C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, C.NAME_KANJI AS CUSTOMER_NAME_KANJI, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(C.OPEN_ACCT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD' ) AS OPEN_ACCT_DATE, TRIM(C.UAI_OCCUPATION) AS PROFESSION, CASE WHEN C.CORPORATION_KBN = '0' THEN C.UAI_OFFICE_NAME WHEN C.CORPORATION_KBN = '1' THEN '-' END AS OFFICE_NAME, C.TC_COMP_RANK AS COMPLIANCE_RANK, TRIM(C.UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN) AS INVESTMENT_POLICY_TYPE, TO_NUMBER(NVL(C.UAI_EXP_STOCK, 0)) AS STOCK_SPOT_INVEST_EXPERIENCE_YEARS, CASE WHEN C.CORPORATION_KBN = '0' THEN C.UAI_QA_FINANCIAL_ASSETS WHEN C.CORPORATION_KBN = '1' THEN '-' END AS FINANCIAL_ASSETS_TYPE, NVL(E.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS DISCRETION_ALLO_COUNT, NVL(E.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) AS DISCRETION_ALLOCATE_ABLE_TIMES, DECODE( K.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_KBN, 1, TO_CHAR(K.EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '' ) AS EDELIV_AGREEMENT_DATE, TO_CHAR(L.READ_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS READ_TIME, CASE WHEN F.LOTTERY_RESULT IS NOT NULL THEN F.LOTTERY_RESULT WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN '4' WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION <> '4' THEN '2' ELSE A.BB_WINNING END AS LOTTERY_RESULT, CASE WHEN F.LOTTERY_RESULT IN ('1', '3', '4', '5') THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(F.QUANTITY_ALLOC, 0)) WHEN F.LOTTERY_RESULT = '2' THEN '0' WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '0' THEN '-' WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(A.BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC) WHEN A.BB_WINNING = '2' AND A.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN TO_CHAR(NVL(H.QUANTITY_SAIRYOU, 0)) ELSE '0' END AS BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC, A.BB_QUANTITY AS BB_QUANTITY, NVL(M.ORDER_STATUS, '0') AS ORDER_STATUS, TO_CHAR(M.ORDER_TIME, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') AS RECRUITMENT_ORDER_DATE, M.ORDER_COUNT AS QUANTITY, M.APPOINT_PRICE AS CONTRACT_AMOUNT, M.CANCEL_TIME AS SUBSCRIPT_CANCEL_DAY_TIME, F.PRODUCT_CODE AS BRAND_CODE12, M.DEPOSIT_TYPE, M.INVITATION_TYPE AS KANYU_KBN, M.ORDER_METHOD AS JUTYU_KBN, M.PROSPECTUS, M.EXPLANATION_INFO AS IMPORTANT_MATTER_TYPE, M.WARNING_APPLY, A.BB_REMARK AS BB_REMARK, C.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_CODE, A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM BOOK_BUILDING_PRESENTATION_FROM, M.DETAIL_NUMBER, C.BROKER_CODE, C.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD AS BROKER_CHARGE_CODE, C.DEALER_NUMBER, G.PRESENTATION_DATE, G.MAX_ALLOCATION, G.ATTACHED_BRAND AS BRAND_CODE_WITH1, C.UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN AS TOKUTEI_KOUZA_KBN, C.UAI_ISA_CONTRACT_KBN AS ISA_CONTRACT_TYPE, C.UAI_ISA_BUY_CURRENT_YEAR_KBN AS ISA_BUY_ABLE_JUDGE_CLASSIFICATION_YEAR, TO_CHAR(M.UPDATE_TIME, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') AS UPDATE_TIME_FOR_ORDER_EXCLUSIVITY, NVL2(J.ACCT_ID, '1', '0') AS ACCUMULATE_NISA_FLAG FROM BB_ACCEPT A LEFT OUTER JOIN BB_PRODUCT_MASTER B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO C ON C.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(A.BB_BRANCH_CODE, 1, 3) AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT OUTER JOIN IPO_COUNT_MASTER E ON TO_CHAR(E.ANNUAL, 'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = E.BRANCH_NO AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(E.ACCOUNT_NO) LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_ORDER F ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = F.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = F.PRESENTATION_FROM AND SUBSTR(A.BB_BRANCH_CODE, 1, 3) = F.BUTEN_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = F.ACCOUNT_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD G ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = G.PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = G.PRESENTATION_FROM LEFT OUTER JOIN SR_ACCEPT H ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = H.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = H.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = H.BB_BRANCH_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(H.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT OUTER JOIN SVC_ACCT_PROFILE_IFAP J ON J.ACCT_ID = C.BUTEN_CODE || '-' || LPAD(C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, 7, '0') AND J.PROFILE_NAME = 'IsaOpenSelect_s_stage' AND J.PROFILE_VALUE = 'OpenTUMINISA' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_EDELIV_AGRMNT K ON K.BUTEN_CODE = C.BUTEN_CODE AND K.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_DOCUMENT_READ L ON L.PRODUCT_CODE = A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND L.PRESENTATION_FROM = A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AND L.BUTEN_CODE = C.BUTEN_CODE AND L.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND L.DOCUMENT_ID = '00000' AND L.VERSION_NUMBER = '000000' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL M ON F.PRODUCT_CODE = M.PRODUCT_CODE AND F.PRESENTATION_FROM = M.PRESENTATION_FROM AND F.BUTEN_CODE = M.BUTEN_CODE AND F.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = M.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = #{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom} AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, '0'))
AND M.DETAIL_NUMBER = #{req.detailNumber}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql002 */ NVL(A.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) - NVL(A.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) - NVL(G.OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS MAYBE_SAIRYOU_COUNT, NVL(A.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, NVL(G.OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, G.OLD_BRANCH_NO AS oldButenNumber, G.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO AS oldAccountNumber, NVL(A.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) AS MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER A ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(A.BRANCH_NO, 1, 3) AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(A.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(A.ANNUAL, 'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END LEFT JOIN ( SELECT E.BUTEN_CODE AS BUTEN_CODE, E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER, NVL(F.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, E.OLD_BRANCH_NO, E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM ( SELECT C.BUTEN_CODE, C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, D.OLD_BRANCH_NO, D.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO C INNER JOIN CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT D ON C.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(D.NEW_BRANCH_NO, 1, 3) AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(D.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) WHERE C.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) ) E LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER F ON E.OLD_BRANCH_NO = F.BRANCH_NO AND TO_NUMBER(E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO) = TO_NUMBER(F.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(F.ANNUAL, 'YYYY') = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYY') - CASE WHEN IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) G ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = G.BUTEN_CODE AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = G.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql003 */ COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A INNER JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND B.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(B.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, 0)) WHERE A.BB_LOT = '0' AND A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1' AND A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE <> #{req.brandCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql004 */ ORDER_COUNT AS QUANTITY FROM T_IPO_PO_ORDER_DETAIL WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND ORDER_STATUS <> '6'
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql005 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE CODE_TYPE = '38' AND CODE_1 = '01' AND CODE_2 = 'END_TIME'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql006 */ UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN AS TOKUTEI_KOUZA_KBN, UAI_ISA_CONTRACT_KBN AS ISA_CONTRACT_TYPE, UAI_ISA_BUY_CURRENT_YEAR_KBN as ISA_BUY_ABLE_JUDGE_CLASSIFICATION_YEAR, CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID FROM CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.customerCode})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql007 */ COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT FROM CALLCENTER.ATTENTION_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = TO_NUMBER(#{req.customerCode}) AND ON_OFF_FLG = '有効' AND DELETE_TIME IS NULL AND ATTENTION = '株式' AND CATEGORY = 'リスク説明未1'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-04_1#Sql008 */ T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.SECTION_ID, T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.SECTION_NAME AS BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO ON MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.BROKER_CODE = MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO.BROKER_CODE AND MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD = MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF ON MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.BROKER_CODE = T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.BROKER_CODE AND MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE = T_IPO_PO_SECTION_REF.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE WHERE MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND ROWNUM = 1
